name: Strategy idea
lecture_detail: State the hypothesis and whether it is long-only, long-flat, or long-short.

name: Data
lecture_detail: Download or load historical data; keep a CSV contingency if live download fails.

name: Indicators
lecture_detail: Create alpha sources such as SMA, EMA, RSI, Bollinger Bands, MACD.

name: Signals
lecture_detail: Encode entry/exit events from the indicators.

name: Positions
lecture_detail: Carry signals forward and shift positions to avoid look-ahead bias.

name: Returns
lecture_detail: Multiply returns by positions; use cumprod for simple returns and cumsum/exp for log returns.

name: Analysis
lecture_detail: Evaluate equity, drawdown, Sharpe, exposure, and benchmark comparison.
